description: Small synthetic OSS release with one feature and one bugfix PR.

release_notes_prs.title: Add reusable pipeline templates
release_notes_prs.author: fixture-user
release_notes_prs.body: Adds a small library of starter pipeline templates so new users can bootstrap common training workflows without copying examples by hand.

release_notes_prs.title: Show retry status in pipeline run summaries
release_notes_prs.author: fixture-user
release_notes_prs.body: Fixes the run summary panel so retried steps clearly show their latest status and users can see whether a retry recovered successfully.

entries.title: Faster pipeline starts
entries.description: Starter templates help teams create common training pipelines more quickly, while clearer retry status makes run summaries easier to trust.

release_notes_body.content:
#### Faster pipeline starts

Starter templates make it easier to create common training workflows without copying example code by hand ([PR #101](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/101)).

<details><summary>Fixed</summary>

- Pipeline run summaries now show the latest retry status so users can tell whether a retry recovered successfully ([PR #102](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/102)).

</details>

entries.title: Pipeline setup polish
entries.description: Users get a quicker path to reusable pipelines and clearer feedback when retried steps recover inside a run summary.

release_notes_body.content:
#### Pipeline setup polish

Reusable templates give new projects a faster starting point for common training pipelines ([PR #101](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/101)).

<details><summary>Fixed</summary>

- Retry status is now clearer in pipeline run summaries, making recovered runs easier to inspect ([PR #102](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/102)).

</details>
